meta.siteName: American Institute of Applied Education for Tourism & Administrative Research
meta.description: Excellence in applied training, research, and professional development for tourism and administration.

footer.bio: A leading academic institute dedicated to applied education in tourism and administrative research, empowering professionals with rigorous programs and international standards.

home.heroSubtitle: Advance your career with accredited programs designed for the global tourism and administrative sectors.
home.whyFeature1Desc: Over a decade of industry expertise in tourism, hospitality, and administrative leadership.
home.whyFeature2Desc: Curricula benchmarked against the world's leading academic and professional institutions.
home.whyFeature3Desc: Hands-on case studies, simulations, and field projects that deliver immediate workplace impact.
home.whyFeature4Desc: ISO-aligned and nationally recognised qualifications trusted by leading employers.
home.whyFeature5Desc: Dedicated alumni support, career services, and lifelong access to our learning resources.

about.title: About Us
about.visionText: To be a regional reference for applied education and research excellence in tourism and administration.
about.missionText: We deliver practice-oriented programs, foster research, and partner with industry to shape responsible leaders.
about.valuesText: Integrity, excellence, international outlook, and continuous improvement guide every initiative.
